name: Balcad Travel Agency
description: Websaydh dhammaystiran ee Wakaaladda Socdaalka iyo Dalxiiska ee Balcad Travel Agency. Waxaa ku jira maamulka dalabaadka (Orders), wada-sheekaysiga tooska ah (Live Chat) ee u dhexeeya macaamiisha iyo admin-ka, iyo dashboorka maamulka oo leh nidaamka Super Admin iyo Sub-Admin.
